title: capsella smolandica
intro: Capsella smolandica, also known as the Smolanka or Shepherd's Cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is often used to aid in digestion. Capsella smolandica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is also used as a food ingredient in some traditional recipes.
